title: The Shawshank Redemption
overview: Two imprisoned men bond over a number of years finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

title: The Godfather
overview: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control of his clandestine empire to his reluctant son.

title: The Dark Knight
overview: When the menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc on Gotham Batman must accept one of the greatest psychological tests.

title: Pulp Fiction
overview: The lives of two mob hitmen a boxer and a gangsters wife intertwine in tales of violence and redemption.

title: Forrest Gump
overview: A man with a low IQ recounts the events of his life including his meeting with the love of his life.

title: Inception
overview: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream sharing is given the inverse task of planting an idea.

title: The Matrix
overview: A computer hacker learns about the true nature of reality and his role in the war against its controllers.

title: Interstellar
overview: A team of explorers travel through a wormhole in space to ensure humanitys survival among the stars.

title: The Lion King
overview: A young lion prince flees his kingdom after the murder of his father only to learn the true meaning of responsibility.

title: Titanic
overview: A seventeen year old aristocrat falls in love with a kind but poor artist aboard a luxurious ill fated ship.

title: Avatar
overview: A paraplegic marine is dispatched to the moon Pandora on a unique mission but becomes torn between duty and protecting an alien world.

title: The Avengers
overview: Earths mightiest heroes must come together to stop a mischievous villain from enslaving the human race.

title: Toy Story
overview: A cowboy doll is profoundly threatened when a new spaceman action figure supplants him as top toy in a boys room.

title: Finding Nemo
overview: After his son is captured a timid clownfish sets out on a journey to bring him home.

title: Gladiator
overview: A former roman general sets out to exact vengeance against the corrupt emperor who murdered his family.

title: The Departed
overview: An undercover cop and a mole in the police force attempt to identify each other while infiltrating an irish gang.

title: Fight Club
overview: An insomniac office worker and a soap maker form an underground fight club that evolves into something much more.

title: Goodfellas
overview: The story of henry hill and his life in the mob covering his relationship with his wife and his partners.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
overview: A young fbi cadet must receive the help of an incarcerated cannibal killer to catch another serial killer.

title: Se7en
overview: Two detectives a rookie and a veteran hunt a serial killer who uses the seven deadly sins as his motives.

title: Spirited Away
overview: During her familys move to the suburbs a sullen ten year old girl wanders into a world ruled by gods and witches.

title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
overview: The adventures of a legendary concierge at a famous european hotel and the young employee who becomes his trusted friend.

title: La La Land
overview: While navigating their careers in los angeles a pianist and an actress fall in love while attempting to reconcile their ambitions.

title: Whiplash
overview: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cutthroat music conservatory where his dreams are mentored by an instructor who will stop at nothing.

title: Parasite
overview: Greed and class discrimination threaten the newly formed symbiotic relationship between a wealthy family and a poor family.

title: Joker
overview: In gotham city mentally troubled comedian arthur fleck embarks on a downward spiral that leads to the creation of an iconic villain.

title: Coco
overview: Aspiring musician miguel confronts his familys ancient ban on music and enters the land of the dead to find his great great grandfather.

title: Up
overview: Seventy eight year old carl fredricksen travels to paradise falls in his house equipped with balloons.

title: WALL-E
overview: In the distant future a small waste collecting robot inadvertently embarks on a space journey that will ultimately decide the fate of mankind.

title: Frozen
overview: When the newly crowned queen elsa accidentally uses her power to curse her kingdom in eternal winter her sister anna sets off on a journey.

title: Mad Max Fury Road
overview: A woman rebels against a tyrannical ruler in postapocalyptic australia in search for her homeland with the aid of a group of female prisoners.

title: Star Wars
overview: Luke skywalker joins forces with a jedi knight a cocky pilot a wookiee and two droids to save the galaxy from the empire.

title: Jurassic Park
overview: A pragmatic paleontologist visiting an almost complete theme park is tasked with protecting a couple of kids after a power failure.

title: The Lord of the Rings
overview: A meek hobbit and eight companions set out on a journey to destroy the powerful one ring and save middle earth.

title: Harry Potter and the Sorcerers Stone
overview: An orphaned boy enrolls in a school of wizardry where he learns the truth about himself his family and the terrible evil that haunts the magical world.

title: The Hunger Games
overview: Katniss everdeen voluntarily takes her younger sisters place in the hunger games a televised competition in which two teenagers from each district fight to the death.

title: Black Panther
overview: Tchalla returns home to the isolated technologically advanced african nation of wakanda to serve as his countrys new king.

title: Get Out
overview: A young african american visits his white girlfriends parents for the weekend where his uneasiness eventually reaches a boiling point.

title: A Quiet Place
overview: A family must navigate their lives in silence while hiding from creatures that hunt by sound.

title: The Conjuring
overview: Paranormal investigators work to help a family terrorized by a dark presence in their farmhouse.

title: Knives Out
overview: A detective investigates the death of a patriarch of an eccentric wealthy family.

title: Coco Before Chanel
overview: The early years of fashion icon coco chanel and her rise from poverty to fame.

title: The Social Network
overview: The story of the founders of facebook and the legal battles that followed its creation.

title: Her
overview: A lonely writer develops an unlikely relationship with an operating system designed to meet his every need.

title: Inside Out
overview: After young rileys family moves to a new city her emotions joy fear anger disgust and sadness conflict on how best to navigate.

title: The Pianist
overview: A jewish pianist struggles to survive the destruction of the warsaw ghetto during world war two.

title: Schindlers List
overview: In poland during world war two a businessman gradually becomes concerned with his jewish employees after witnessing their persecution.

title: Saving Private Ryan
overview: Following the normandy landings a group of soldiers go behind enemy lines to retrieve a paratrooper whose brothers have died in combat.

title: Braveheart
overview: A scottish warrior leads his countrymen in a rebellion to free his homeland from the tyranny of king edward.

title: Casino Royale
overview: James bond embarks on his first mission as a 00 agent traveling to montenegro to bankrupt a terrorist financier.
